choice: Dashboard + Scenarios/Forecasts + Assets with holdings attribution + Allocation view + Household settings
rationale: The binding priors collectively make the 'Balances-only minimal surface' incompatible with the established architecture. 2949f831 establishes a full Scenario/Forecast domain model requiring dedicated Scenarios/Forecasts screens. 5edebac0 mandates a Dashboard with a three-layer tracking chart. a5edec0f and db09d3a5 establish synced and manual assets that need an Assets management surface. c9da4675 and c1c6e5f9 establish Household/Persons/auth requiring a Household settings screen. 479caa25 (the two core jobs) demands both asset-update visibility and actual-vs-plan comparison, which cannot be satisfied by balances alone. b6012bc6 adds income streams and contributions that need UI exposure. The full Option 1 surface is the minimum coherent UI for this domain model; balances-only would leave Scenarios, Forecasts, Persons, income streams, and the tracking chart all inaccessible.
